description: Configure the store's Minimum Advertised Price (MAP) settings. Enable MAP globally with the 'Default Explanation Message' set to 'Add to cart to see our special low price!'. For the product 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001), set the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price to 1200.00 and configure the 'Display Actual Price' setting to 'In Cart'. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.

metadata.expected_message: Add to cart to see our special low price!
